tasks.label: scan-touched-for-markers-clean
tasks.command: cd /Users/adegokeabiodun/Developer/voltx-platform && files=$( (git diff --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard) | sort -u ); found=0; for f in $files; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then out=$(grep -nE 'TODO|FIXME|debugger|console\.log\(' "$f" || true); if [ -n "$out" ]; then echo "-- $f"; echo "$out"; found=1; fi; fi; done; echo "marker_found=$found"

tasks.label: check-e2e-process-finished
tasks.command: if pgrep -f 'node /opt/homebrew/bin/pnpm test:e2e|node .*jest/bin/jest.js --config ./test/jest-e2e.json' >/dev/null; then echo e2e_process=running; else echo e2e_process=done; fi

tasks.label: stage-and-commit-rag-milestone
tasks.command: cd /Users/adegokeabiodun/Developer/voltx-platform && git add -A && git reset .vscode/tasks.json && git commit -m "feat(knowledge): deliver RAG v1 ingestion, retrieval, and observability" && git rev-parse --short HEAD && git status --short
